hero.title: My clipper formats

hero.speech: Tune a format and the next pieces file themselves better.

community.heading: Community formats
community.empty: No community formats yet. When someone shares one, it shows up here.

add.title: Add a format
add.body: Describe the material and how you'd file it. SecondB suggests a reusable filing guide.
add.placeholder: e.g. Podcast episodes - capture the guest and key claims
add.errorNeedDetail: Couldn't draft a filing guide. Add detail and try again.
add.errorDraft: We couldn't draft the filing guide. Please try again in a moment.
add.errorSave: We couldn't save the format. Please try again.
